case_title: SABRINA HAGER VS. KEYOPP PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,615.69 FILED BY HAGER, SABRINA AS TO DEFENDANT KEYOPP PROPERTY MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
